props.ChoiceText: You learned how stolen goods become clean coin, and how many hands take a share before the purse closes.
props.ChoiceBio: Fencing stolen goods taught you that information can be as valuable as theft.

0.TransitionText: Because fencing stolen goods taught you that information can be as valuable as theft, trade and criminality began to share the same logic.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because fencing stolen goods taught you that information can be as valuable as theft, theft itself became more professional and more ambitious.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Master Thief, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because fencing stolen goods taught you that information can be as valuable as theft, you remained in crime with sharper instincts.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

0.TargetText: A fence or broker who remembers what you learned and what you know.
